name_en: Chanel🚾25B Double C logo handle. Exquisite handle design for a stylish look. Grained calfskin paired with vintage metal hardware. Premium, durable texture. Classic design style, versatile and practical. Really exquisite. High aesthetic appeal, compact. Falling in love with this makeup bag, it looks beautiful when carried. Pairs perfectly with any outfit to make you look stunning. A pleasant surprise for this season's new arrivals. Size: 18.5cm
